rationale: Faithful Task 4a within frozen v13+AM-40 scope. inventory.mjs commits exact PACKAGE_ROOTS (five spine packages) + explicit PACKAGE_ROOTS_EXCLUDE (three siblings) with AM-40 completeness unit (git-tracked package.json discovery == union, intersection empty); DOC_ROOTS, docs/runs + self-weave exclusions, CONTRACT_FILES (D31), five weaver ids+integer versions, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS exactly equal to the frozen normative table with equality unit, LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS deep-frozen with deep-equal/key/value/mutation units, and WEAVER_IMPL_FILES only for git+code (D17/AM-17) naming only existing files. util.mjs exports the single D33 classifier+resolver (AM-34 test 19: one definition site, both closure derivation and code weaver consume it), comment/string-aware lexer, Phase-1 export scanner, real-file walker (escape/symlink reject), D26/D29 counted-iterator (count only on completed consumption; accounting driver-held only), D21 physical-containment (lstat every component, never follow), and no-shell git allowlist of exact shapes. test-closure.mjs derives closures with the shared machinery and proves committed inventories equal derived fixed points, covering every accepted form via form-only fixtures plus recursion/cycles/unreachable-literal/permitted-merkle-dag and all fatal/no-edge modes. git.mjs uses exact `log -S… --format=%H --reverse -- <path>` / `log --format=%H --reverse -- <path>`, first SHA, git:<sha>, malformed fatal, no-result warns. code.mjs emits all four depends-on endpoint shapes with symbol- vs file-level threading, unrepresentable-consumer only for unresolvable, unused/comments/strings no edge, dedup. Zero runtime deps, ESM, node:/clotho-relative only, spine read-only, gate finalStatus=meets. Orchestrator inventory, D34 re-derivation, and test/doc/ledger weavers correctly deferred to 4b/5.
